nodes.title: Adopt PBE for the next Todo search slice
nodes.why: The existing Todo app needs a small, reviewable search improvement.
nodes.acceptanceNotRequiredReason: Root groups the selected search capability.

nodes.title: Todo title and note search

source.confirmationSource: user approved PP-001 in parent orchestration chat on 2026-06-24

nodes.why: The user needs to find todos when the list grows.

meaningRevision.confirmationSource: user approved PP-001 in parent orchestration chat on 2026-06-24

acceptanceCriteria.condition: The user enters a search query
acceptanceCriteria.shall: SHALL show todos whose title or note content contains the normalized query
acceptanceCriteria.observableResult: Todos matching either title or note content remain visible after trimming and collapsing repeated whitespace in the query.
acceptanceCriteria.statement: WHEN the user enters a search query, THE SYSTEM SHALL show todos whose title or note content contains the normalized query.

acceptanceCriteria.shall: SHALL show the full Todo list
acceptanceCriteria.observableResult: All existing todos are visible again.
acceptanceCriteria.statement: WHEN the search query is empty, THE SYSTEM SHALL show the full Todo list.

acceptanceCriteria.condition: No Todo title or note content matches the query
acceptanceCriteria.shall: SHALL show an empty search result state
acceptanceCriteria.observableResult: The UI communicates that no matching todos were found.
acceptanceCriteria.statement: WHEN no Todo title or note content matches the query, THE SYSTEM SHALL show an empty search result state.

assumptions.text: The first slice searches Todo title only.
After PP-001 confirmation, the representative slice searches Todo title and note/content.
assumptions.source: user approved PP-001 in parent orchestration chat on 2026-06-24
